sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n18784" key="a)xrhsteu/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀχρησ-τεύω</orth>, Gramm., <sense id="n18784.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">not to be in use,</tr_> Sch.D.T.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.195H.</biblScope> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
